content.cn_text: 欢迎大家……大家都能看到和听到我吗?我是Sarah Conor, Earn and Learn的人力资源代表。
content.en_text: Welcome to all of you...Can everybody see and hear me?...Good...I'm Sarah Conor, an HR representative of Earn and Learn.

content.cn_text: 今天我被要求向你们谈谈我们的
content.en_text: I have been asked today to talk to you about our

content.cn_text: 公司。
content.en_text: company.

content.cn_text: 所以，对于那些不太了解这家公司的人，让我先给你们一些基本的信息。
content.en_text: So, for those of you who don't know very much about the company, let me start by giving you some basic information about it.

content.cn_text: “挣与学”始于近20年前。
content.en_text: Earn and Learn started nearly twenty years ago.

content.cn_text: 它不是慈善机构，而是一家营利性公司，让有前途的企业家在旅行中赚钱。
content.en_text: It is not a charity but a for-profit company that enables promising entrepreneurs to make money while traveling.

content.cn_text: 在过去的十年里，它发展迅速，在世界上大多数国家都有很大的影响力。
content.en_text: During the past ten years, it has grown rapidly and has gained great influence in most countries of the world.

content.cn_text: 我们与该校有合作关系，并招收了该校大量应届毕业生。
content.en_text: We have a partnership with the school and take a large number of recent graduates from the business school.

content.cn_text: 所以，如果你是应届毕业生，我建议你可以考虑申请我们公司。
content.en_text: So if you are a recent graduate I'd say you can consider applying to our company.

content.cn_text: 在申请之前，你可能会好奇你可以去什么样的地方。有四个主要的地点，但你也可以自由地提交一个不同的地点，如果他们能做出必要的安排，你就可以去。
content.en_text: Before your application, you might be curious about what sort of places you could go to.There are four main locations, but you also have the freedom to submit a different location and if they can make the necessary arrangements, you can go.

content.cn_text: Earn and Learn在美国建立的第一个国家是美国，在那里你可以从多个地点选择，只要你能遵守他们更严格的8月到12月的时间表。
content.en_text: The first country Earn and Learn established locations in was the U.S., where you may choose from multiple locations, as long as you can commit to their more rigid schedule of August to December.

content.cn_text: 还有，你可以去澳大利亚实习。
content.en_text: Also, you could do the Australia internship.

content.cn_text: 这个真的很酷——你在一个野生动物收容所工作，学习非营利组织的商业实践。
content.en_text: That one is really cool - you work at a wildlife shelter and learn about the business practices of nonprofit organisations.

content.cn_text: 不过，你必须愿意为此付出8个月的时间。
content.en_text: You do have to be willing to commit 8 months for that one, though.

content.cn_text: 也许在这么远的地方呆了很长时间，但我想说这真的是一个很棒的机会。
content.en_text: Perhaps that's a long time to be so far away, but I would say it is really an amazing opportunity.

content.cn_text: 我不知道你们中的一些人是否身材匀称。
content.en_text: I don't know whether some of you are in decent physical shape.

content.cn_text: 如果是这样的话，南非的实习是另一个令人兴奋的工作——你会学到很多关于可持续农业的知识——但你会做一些体力劳动
content.en_text: If so, the South Africa internship is another exciting one - you learn a lot about sustainable farming - but you would be doing some of the manual labor involved in

content.cn_text: 维持一个农场。
content.en_text: maintaining a farm.

content.cn_text: 的确，这是一项艰苦的工作，但我认为你一定能做到。等到他们的夏天结束，这样就不会太热了，这可能是明智的。
content.en_text: Indeed, it's hard work, but I think you would definitely be able to do it.It may be wise to wait until after their summer is over so it's not so terribly hot.

content.cn_text: 此外，还有一个最近在印度建立的地点。
content.en_text: In addition, there is a most recently established location in India.

content.cn_text: 这一个给你更多的出国留学的感觉，因为他们为你安排了一个寄宿家庭。
content.en_text: This one gives you more of a study abroad feel, given that they arrange a host family for you to stay with.

content.cn_text: 在其他地方，你和其他实习生住在一个公寓里，所以这绝对是一次独特的经历。
content.en_text: In the other locations, you live in an apartment with other interns, so this is definitely a unique experience.

content.cn_text: 无论你去哪里，只要你能解释你的经历，在课程结束时你都会得到一张全球旅行证书。
content.en_text: Regardless of where you go, at the end of the program you get a Global Traveling Certificate, as long as you can explain your experience.

content.cn_text: 你可以提供你所做的工作的书面记录。
content.en_text: You can provide a written log of what you did.

content.cn_text: 我建议你写日记或博客记录你每天做的事情，或者每周总结一下每天做的事情。
content.en_text: I recommend writing journal or blog entries about what you do every day, or a weekly summary of each day.

content.cn_text: 当然，你不必写一份正式的报告或类似的东西。
content.en_text: Of course you don't have to write up a formal report or anything like that.

content.cn_text: .你一回来就需要申请。
content.en_text: And you need to apply for it once you have returned.

content.cn_text: 有些学生可能想知道这是否是带薪实习。
content.en_text: Some students may want to know whether this is a paid internship.

content.cn_text: 实际上你得自己付机票钱。
content.en_text: Actually you have to pay for the flight there yourself.

content.cn_text: 但是你有机会创建自己的小生意，如果成功的话，你可以赚到钱。
content.en_text: But you have the opportunity to create your own small business, which could earn you money if it's successfi.il.

content.cn_text: 所以基本上都是你付的
content.en_text: So basically you pay for it all up

content.cn_text: 前面，但是当你在那里的时候，你可以找到赚钱的方法。
content.en_text: front, but when you're there you can find ways to make money.

content.cn_text: 也就是说，你先付三分之二的订金，然后在你回来前一个月付最后一笔货款。
content.en_text: That is to say, you pay for two thirds of the cost up front as a deposit, and then give the final installment one month prior to your return.

content.cn_text: 最后，我必须提醒你，在你走之前，你需要做一个健康检查，以确保你不会传播任何传染病。
content.en_text: Finally, I have to remind you that you need a health check before you go, to make sure you're not going to spread any communicable diseases.

content.cn_text: 此外，在你离开之前，你不必参加任何会议或研讨会。
content.en_text: In addition, before you go,you don't have to attend any meetings or workshops.

content.cn_text: 一旦你到了那里，你就会见到你的同事。
content.en_text: You'll meet everyone you'll be working with once you get there.

content.cn_text: 好了，今天就讲到这里。
content.en_text: Okay, well, that's all I've time for today.

content.cn_text: 谢谢大家的倾听，如果你们有任何问题，我很乐意回答。
content.en_text: Thanks for listening and I'm happy to take any questions if you have them...

groups.desc:
Questions 11-12
Complete the sentences below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer .
groups.collect:
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer .
The program is made for travelers to make $17615$
The program operates in cooperation with the $17616$

items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于理解Earn and Learn公司的核心业务。从公司名称"Earn and Learn"开始，我们就能看出这个项目与赚钱有关。文中明确指出这是一家"for-profit company"（营利性公司），而不是慈善机构。更重要的是，原文直接说明了公司的目的是"enables promising entrepreneurs to make money while traveling"（让有前途的企业家在旅行时赚钱）。这里的"make money"（赚钱）就是我们需要填写的答案。题目要求填写一个单词，所以正确答案是"money"。记住，在听力考试中，有时答案会直接出现在原文中，就像这个例子一样。但有时也需要你根据上下文进行推理。在这个问题中，即使你没有听到完整的句子，只要捕捉到"make money"这个关键短语，也能正确回答问题。

这道题的关键在于理解原文中提到的合作关系。文中明确说明"We have a partnership with the school"，这里的"partnership"就是题干中"cooperation"的同义词。而"school"正是我们需要填写的答案。之所以选择"school"而不是"business school"，是因为题目要求只填写一个单词，而且"school"更加准确地概括了整个合作关系。此外，"school"作为一个更广泛的术语，包含了"business school"这个更具体的概念。因此，"school"是最恰当的答案，既符合题目要求，又准确反映了原文的意思。

groups.desc:
Questions 13-16
What is the internship stipulation of each country below?
Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-F, next to questions 13-16.
Internship Stipulation

items.title: USA
items.analysis: 关键信息是 "rigid schedule of August to December"（严格的8月至12月的时间安排）。这明确表示美国项目有固定的时间段要求，对应选项 E（specific time period）。

items.title: Australia
items.analysis: 听力原文明确提到澳大利亚实习项目时指出："You do have to be willing to commit 8 months for that one, though."（你必须愿意为此投入8个月的时间）。这里的 "commit 8 months" 表明澳大利亚项目有明确的最短时间要求，即至少需要8个月的参与。选项 C（minimum time requirement） 直接对应这一信息。

items.title: South Africa
items.analysis: 文中明确提到南非实习项目涉及"sustainable farming"（可持续农业）和"maintaining a farm"（维护农场）。这直接对应了选项F中的"agriculture"（农业）。因此，南非实习项目的主要特点是与农业相关的活动，这使得F成为最符合的答案。

items.title: India
items.analysis: 文中明确提到印度实习项目的特点是安排寄宿家庭（host family），这与选项A "home stay"直接对应。寄宿家庭是一种典型的家庭寄宿（home stay）形式，为学生提供了独特的文化沉浸体验。此外，文中强调这种安排给予了"更多的留学体验感"，进一步支持了家庭寄宿的特点。因此，A选项是最符合印度实习项目特点的答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 17-20
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: What should you do to get the Global Traveling Certificate?

options.title: C
options.content: talk the experience with the assessor

items.analysis: 文中明确指出，为了获得Global Traveling Certificate，需要解释你的经历。紧接着，演讲者推荐通过写日记或博客来记录每天的活动。这表明获得证书的方法是通过记录日常活动来解释你的经历，而不是正式报告或口头解释。因此，选项A"record activity everyday"最符合原文的要求。

items.title: You can apply for the certificate
items.analysis: 文中明确指出申请证书的时间是"once you have returned"，即在回来之后。这直接对应了选项A "only after you come back"。文中没有提到可以在旅行中或出发前申请证书，因此排除了B和C选项。此外，使用"once"这个连词强调了时间顺序，表明申请证书必须在回来之后进行，这进一步确认了A选项是唯一正确答案。

items.title: When should you pay the final installment?

options.title: C
options.content: before you get your plane ticket

items.analysis: 文中明确指出最后一笔付款（final installment）应在返回前一个月（one month prior to your return）支付。这直接对应了选项B "one month before you return"，因此B是正确答案。这个时间点既不是出发前，也不是在获得机票之前，而是在项目结束返回之前的特定时间。

items.title: Before your application, you need

options.title: C
options.content: to meet people with whom you will work.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出在出发前需要进行健康检查。虽然题目问的是"申请前"需要做什么，但在这个语境中，"申请前"和"出发前"可以视为同一时间段。健康检查是唯一被明确要求在这个时间段内完成的事项，因此A选项是正确答案。
